preConditions.onErrorMessage: Precondition check failed unexpectedly for 005-create-sequence-users — halting migration

changeSet.author: osama
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE users ALTER COLUMN user_id DROP IDENTITY IF EXISTS

changeSet.author: osama
changeSet.sql: SELECT setval('users_sequence', GREATEST(COALESCE((SELECT MAX(user_id) FROM users), 0) + 500, 1))

preConditions.onErrorMessage: Precondition check failed unexpectedly for 005-create-sequence-tokens — halting migration

changeSet.author: osama
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE tokens ALTER COLUMN token_id DROP IDENTITY IF EXISTS

changeSet.author: osama
changeSet.sql: SELECT setval('tokens_sequence', GREATEST(COALESCE((SELECT MAX(token_id) FROM tokens), 0) + 500, 1))

preConditions.onErrorMessage: Precondition check failed unexpectedly for 005-create-sequence-otps — halting migration

changeSet.author: osama
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE otps ALTER COLUMN otp_id DROP IDENTITY IF EXISTS

changeSet.author: osama
changeSet.sql: SELECT setval('otps_sequence', GREATEST(COALESCE((SELECT MAX(otp_id) FROM otps), 0) + 500, 1))
